top_signals.title: Dollar Gains After Hot Jobs Data as Traders Price In Rate Hikes
top_signals.summary: The dollar advanced after US jobs data came in stronger than anticipated, signaling further signs of labor market resiliency, and progress in US-Iran peace deal talks stalled.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: AI is designing OpenAI's next model in a sign of 'super intelligence': SoftBank's Masayoshi Son to CNBC
top_signals.summary: SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son said his forecast of artificial super intelligence arriving in ten years was "conservative" and thinks it will be here sooner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ABS Grants AiP for Nuclear Reactor Integration in Vessel Design
top_signals.summary: ABS issued approval in principle (AIP) for the integration of a nuclear reactor into a cargo vessel propulsion system developed by the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), HD Korea Shipbuilding & Offshore Engineering (HD KSOE) and Capital…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
